title: bromus ciliatus
intro: Bromus ciliatus, also known as fringed brome, is a species of grass native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bromus ciliatus include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Bromus ciliatus can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
